description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior is predominantly white with large windows arranged asymmetrically, allowing for ample natural light. The front features a prominent entryway with steps leading up to a covered porch, flanked by landscaped greenery and mature trees. On one side, there is a visible garage structure, while the rear includes a spacious patio area and a rectangular swimming pool. The house is surrounded by lush vegetation, providing privacy and a sense of seclusion. The overall aesthetic is minimalist, with sharp lines and a focus on open, functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, multi-story white house with flat roofs, large windows, a front porch, garage, and a backyard pool, surrounded by trees and greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with steps, covered porch, and landscaped greenery.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, dense tree coverage, and partial view of the pool and patio.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the garage, backyard patio, and rectangular swimming pool.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, patio, and additional outdoor seating area among the trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with wide steps, covered porch, and minimalist door flanked by windows and landscaping
